mandate: Show dashboard home image on mobile resized, verify Twilio upgrade compatibility
keyFindings: HomeView.tsx hid the Couple1.png image entirely on mobile via {!isMobile && ...}. Removed conditional and added minHeight: 180 for mobile so the image renders at a fixed visible height.

Twilio SDK v5.13.0 usage is fully compatible — singleton client pattern (twilio(sid, token)), validateRequest static method, availablePhoneNumbers().local.list(), and incomingPhoneNumbers.create() all match v5 API. No breaking changes needed for minor/patch upgrades within v5.
whatWorked: Single targeted edit to remove the conditional and add minHeight. TypeScript compiled cleanly with no errors.
recommendationsForNextAgent: The image uses next/image with fill prop, which requires the parent to have explicit dimensions. On desktop the grid row gives it height; on mobile the minHeight: 180 is the fallback. If a different aspect ratio is desired on mobile, adjust that value.
mannaConsumed: low — under 5k tokens of tool usage
spiritContribution: Mobile visual polish and dependency health verification supporting the September launch.
